projectDescription: Veritome is a EU AI Act compliance platform that helps European SMEs classify AI systems, auto-map obligations, generate audit-ready dossiers (Annex IV, FRIA, DoC), run Article 4 literacy training, and stay regulator-ready — article by article.
keyFeatures: Guided AI system classification wizard — article-by-article risk-tier assignment (Unacceptable / High-Risk / Limited / Minimal) with Article 5 prohibited-practice screening
Obligation Engine — auto-maps the exact EU AI Act duties that apply to each system based on role (provider/deployer/GPAI), risk tier, and Annex III domain
Audit-ready dossier generation — one-click export of Annex IV technical documentation, FRIA (Art. 27), Declaration of Conformity, and Annex VIII registration
Public verify URL — hash-sealed AI System ID card at /verify/system/[slug] for regulator-facing transparency
Aria AI assistant — EU-hosted Mistral-powered compliance copilot that answers questions, auto-maps evidence, drafts notices, and suggests field completions
Article 4 AI Literacy training — built-in training programmes with completion tracking, certificates, and compliance reports for staff
Evidence Management & Evidence Map — attach documents to obligations, track expiry, and visualise cross-obligation evidence reuse
Incident Reporting (Art. 73) — four-eyes workflow for logging, reviewing, and reporting AI incidents with authority register and deadline tracking
Compliance Calendar & Tasks — deadline tracker auto-populated from obligation due dates and regulatory timelines
API keys & Webhooks — programmatic access to systems, obligations, and events (Growth plan and above)
OAuth evidence connectors — Google Drive, SharePoint, GitHub, Jira integrations for pulling compliance evidence automatically
SSO & SCIM — enterprise single sign-on and seat provisioning (Business/Enterprise plans)
Pricing tiers — Free, Starter (€59/mo), Core (€149/mo), Growth (€349/mo), Business (€699/mo), Enterprise (custom); 20% annual discount
publicApiSurface: POST /api/systems — register a new AI system
GET /api/systems/[id]/obligations — list obligations for a system
GET /api/ai-literacy/compliance-report — export AI literacy compliance report
GET /verify/system/[slug] — public AI System ID verification page (no auth required)
